'''Quintus Farel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Samarian]] who died along with his parents in a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] accident at the age of two.

Quintus Farel's identity was stolen in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> by [[Astri Oddo]] to cover up her tracks as she sabotaged the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Sath]]'s computer and data system.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' {{1stm}}
